title: Credentials parameters not visible in Docker setup
symptom: After updating n8n, the user cannot see the credentials parameters in the interface. This issue is specific to the Docker setup.
not_this_if: Using a different version of n8n
root_cause: A bug in the current version of n8n causes issues with the visibility of credentials parameters when the N8N_DEFAULT_LOCALE environment variable is set. This can lead to unexpected behavior in the user interface.
fix_steps: Check if the credentials parameters are now visible
agent_instruction: Remove the N8N_DEFAULT_LOCALE environment variable from your Docker command and restart the container.
